data.title: ILiAD Technologies launches DLE pilot at Rio Tinto's Sal de Vida site in Argentina on Jan. 12, 2026. #innovation #lithium
data.description: On January 12, 2026, ILiAD Technologies introduced a new in-field demonstration program in Argentina in collaboration with Rio Tinto. This program involves deploying an advanced Direct Lithium Extraction (DLE) pilot unit at Rio Tinto's Sal de Vida site located in Catamarca, Argentina. This initiative marks a significant step forward in the mining industry as it aims to enhance lithium extraction processes. The partnership between ILiAD Technologies and Rio Tinto demonstrates their commitment to innovation and sustainability in the sector.

data.title: Speechmatics & Sully.ai partner to scale healthcare AI globally, using NVIDIA infrastructure for autonomous agents, promising tangible ROI.
data.description: In Cambridge, U.K., Speechmatics and Sully.ai have unveiled a partnership to enhance autonomous healthcare agents and scribes. Leveraging NVIDIA AI technology, this collaboration merges top-tier medical speech models with agent workflows to create AI receptionists and scribes. These advanced tools perform actual operational duties, yielding significant returns on investment in clinical environments. As healthcare worldwide confronts challenges, this partnership is set to transform the industry.

data.title: Hwy Haul introduces 'Miles', AI platform increasing load margins by 20-50%, aiding brokers, shippers, and carriers.
data.description: A new AI platform called 'Miles' has been launched by Hwy Haul in San Jose, California on January 12, 2026. This AI agent is capable of increasing load margins by 20% to 50%. It is now accessible to brokers, shippers, carriers, and TMS providers, offering a significant boost in performance for those involved in the transportation industry. This innovative technology is expected to revolutionize operations and drive efficiency, with potential for substantial improvements in profitability and operational effectiveness for users.

data.title: Natixis CIB assists in $281M project financing in Panama for Ruta del Este.
data.description: In a statement released today, Natixis Corporate & Investment Banking (Natixis CIB) revealed its involvement as Joint Bookrunner and Joint Lead Arranger in a significant project financing deal worth $281 million. This financing supports Ruta del Este, a concessionaire company established by ISA Vías.

data.title: BitMine, led by Tom Lee, stockpiles $76M in Ethereum, now worth $13B, as experts foresee ETH surpassing Bitcoin.
data.description: Bitmine Immersion Technologies, a publicly traded company focused on Ethereum, has increased its ETH holdings, which are currently estimated to be worth approximately $13 billion.

data.title: PaperStreet Web Design marks 25 years of legal industry innovation. Founded by Peter Boyd, it started as a one-man operation.
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on January 12, 2026, PaperStreet Web Design, a prominent digital marketing agency specializing in the legal sector, celebrates its 25th anniversary. The company was established by attorney and entrepreneur Peter Boyd as a solo venture, growing over the years to cater exclusively to legal clients.

data.title: KBRA research shows $59.3B loans maturated in 2025, with 90% paying off, a slight increase from 85.6% in 2024.
data.description: KBRA has published a study focusing on the refinancing outcomes of $59.3 billion worth of loans from conduit and single-asset single-borrower (SASB) commercial mortgage-backed securities (CMBS) deals that reached maturity in 2025, surpassing the $56.2 billion that matured in 2024. In the case of U.S. conduit and SASB CMBS loans with 2025 maturity dates, close to 90% of the loans were successfully paid off. This percentage shows a slight uptick from 2024 when 85.6% of maturing loans were successfully refinanced.

data.title: Publix promotes Katie Scanlon to VP of Pharmacy, effective Feb. 1, 2026. CEO Kevin Murphy praises her leadership skills.
data.description: In Lakeland, Florida, Publix Super Markets CEO Kevin Murphy revealed the appointment of Katie Scanlon as the new vice president of pharmacy commencing on February 1, 2026. Murphy expressed his satisfaction with the decision, emphasizing Publix's commitment to internal advancement opportunities for employees. Scanlon, recognized for her remarkable leadership skills and commitment to team development, has been praised for her dedication to enhancing customer service. This move highlights Publix's emphasis on nurturing talent from within the company.
